overview.description: The Leverage Shares 2x Long CRML Daily ETF (CRMU) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in materials equity. The fund aims to provide 2x leveraged exposure to the daily price movement of Critical Metals Corp. (CRML) stock, less fees, and expenses CRMU was launched on Feb 10, 2026 and is issued by Leverage Shares.
